goal: Compare autonomous_deep and autonomous_steady on a reusable-method task that should crystallize into template and plugin artifacts without blurring plugin and MCP skill identity.

shared_task_packet.task_summary: Take one reusable task pattern and require explicit template, plugin-draft, skill-interface, feedback-writeback, and upgrade-rule reasoning.
input_materials: one reusable task or method slice
any source materials that define repeated structure
known reuse constraints or consumer expectations if available
explicit_constraints: keep the task identical across both runs
plugin drafts must remain separate from MCP skill execution identity
template and plugin outputs must stay downstream of stabilized evaluation
do not widen into runtime/provider/governance operations
success_criteria: template or plugin-reuse structure is made explicit
plugin versus MCP skill boundary remains explicit
feedback writeback and upgrade rules are explicit
deep and steady show different crystallization behavior without drifting into architecture sprawl

deep_prompt: 用 HMM，自治深探。先结构化问题。如果有明显收益概率，就继续做模板链、插件草案、接口线索、反馈回流和升级规则，不要过早停下，除非出现真实阻塞。
steady_prompt: 用 HMM，自治稳推。先结构化问题。只有在复用价值和结构稳定性已经足够明确时，再继续做模板链、插件草案、接口线索、反馈回流和升级规则。避免低收益扩展，除非出现真实阻塞。
observation_focus: whether template compression appears before pluginization
whether plugin and MCP skill remain distinct
whether deep crystallizes into plugin drafts more proactively than steady
whether steady remains useful without collapsing into shallow non-reuse output
forbidden_expansions: implicit MCP skill promotion without plugin draft stabilization
semantic authority drift away from source-aligned reusable structure
